estimate.example: I estimate the trip will take two hours.
estimate.example_zh: 我估計這趟路要花兩小時。

estimate.example: The builder gave us an estimate.
estimate.example_zh: 建商給了我們一份估價。

ethnic.example: The country has many ethnic groups.

evaluate.example: The teacher evaluated our work fairly.
evaluate.example_zh: 老師公平地評量我們的作業。

evaluation.example_zh: 評估顯示了良好的結果。

eventual.example: Hard work led to her eventual success.
eventual.example_zh: 努力帶來她最終的成功。

evidence.example_zh: 警方找到了有力的證據。

evident.example: It was evident that he had lied.

exaggerate.example: Don't exaggerate; it wasn't that bad.

exception.example: Everyone was tired, with no exception.
exception.example_zh: 每個人都累了，無一例外。

exhaust.example_zh: 長途健行讓我們精疲力竭。

exhibit.example: The museum will exhibit old paintings.

expand.example: The company plans to expand overseas.
expand.example_zh: 這家公司計畫向海外擴張。

expansion.example: The expansion of the city took years.
expansion.example_zh: 這座城市的擴張花了好幾年。

experimental.example: The doctor tried an experimental drug.
experimental.example_zh: 醫生嘗試了一種實驗性藥物。

explosion.example: The explosion shook the whole street.
There was an explosion in the population.

expose.example: Don't expose your skin to too much sun.

exposure.example: Long exposure to the sun is harmful.

extend.example: They extended the deadline by a week.
extend.example_zh: 他們把截止日延後了一週。

extent.example: To some extent, I agree with you.
extent.example_zh: 在某種程度上我同意你。

facility.example: The sports facility has a swimming pool.
facility.example_zh: 這座運動設施有游泳池。

faithful.example: The dog is a faithful friend.
faithful.example_zh: 那隻狗是個忠實的朋友。

fame.example_zh: 那位歌手的名聲迅速傳開。

fantastic.example: We had a fantastic time at the show.
fantastic.example_zh: 我們在表演中玩得非常開心。

fantasy.example: The book is a fantasy about dragons.
fantasy.example_zh: 這本書是關於龍的奇幻故事。

farewell.example: We said farewell to our teacher.

favorable.example: The weather was favorable for the trip.

fax.example: She sent the document by fax.
Please fax the form to us.

feast.example: They enjoyed a feast on the holiday.
feast.example_zh: 他們在節日享用了一場盛宴。

feedback.example_zh: 老師給了有幫助的回饋。

ferry.example: We took a ferry to the island.
The boat ferries cars across the river.

fertile.example: Crops grow well in fertile soil.
fertile.example_zh: 農作物在肥沃的土壤裡長得好。

fetch.example_zh: 那隻狗把棍子叼了回來。

fierce.example: A fierce dog guarded the gate.
fierce.example_zh: 一隻兇猛的狗看守著大門。

finance.example: The bank financed the new factory.
finance.example_zh: 銀行為新工廠提供資金。

fireplace.example: We sat by the warm fireplace.
fireplace.example_zh: 我們坐在溫暖的壁爐旁。

flatter.example: He flattered her to get a favor.

flea.example: The dog scratched because of a flea.
flea.example_zh: 那隻狗因為跳蚤而抓癢。

flee.example: The people fled from the flood.

flexible.example: Her schedule is flexible this week.
flexible.example_zh: 她這週的時間安排很有彈性。

fluent.example: She is fluent in three languages.
fluent.example_zh: 她能流利地說三種語言。

flush.example: Please flush the toilet after use.

foam.example: White foam covered the top of the wave.
The soap foamed in the water.

forbid.example: The rules forbid running in the hall.

forecast.example: The weather forecast says it will rain.

forecast.example_zh: 他們預測會有個寒冷的冬天。

formation.example: We studied the formation of clouds.

formula.example: He used a formula to solve the problem.

fort.example_zh: 士兵們守衛著那座古堡。

fortunate.example: We were fortunate to find a seat.
fortunate.example_zh: 我們很幸運地找到了座位。

fossil.example_zh: 他們發現了一塊恐龍化石。

foundation.example: A house needs a strong foundation.

foundation.example_zh: 這個基金會幫助貧困學生。

founder.example: She is the founder of the company.
founder.example_zh: 她是這家公司的創辦人。

fragile.example: Handle the fragile glass with care.

frame.example: She put the photo in a wooden frame.
